Intelligent PDU

# Intelligent PDU

Publisher Global Industry Analysts

Published Oct 01, 2025

Length 192 Pages

SKU # GJOB20484421

Print

## Description

Global Intelligent PDU Market to Reach US$3.2 Billion by 2030

The global market for Intelligent PDU estimated at US$2.1 Billion in the year 2024, is expected to reach US$3.2 Billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 6.8% over the analysis period 2024-2030. Dual Circuit PDU, one of the segments analyzed in the report, is expected to record a 5.3% CAGR and reach US$219.1 Million by the end of the analysis period. Growth in the Hot Swap PDU segment is estimated at 7.8% CAGR over the analysis period.

The U.S. Market is Estimated at US$579.7 Million While China is Forecast to Grow at 6.4% CAGR

The Intelligent PDU market in the U.S. is estimated at US$579.7 Million in the year 2024. China, the world`s second largest economy, is forecast to reach a projected market size of US$498.2 Million by the year 2030 trailing a CAGR of 6.4% over the analysis period 2024-2030. Among the other noteworthy geographic markets are Japan and Canada, each forecast to grow at a CAGR of 6.2% and 5.6% respectively over the analysis period. Within Europe, Germany is forecast to grow at approximately 5.2% CAGR.
